===[[Pokémon UNITE]]===
Raihan and his {{p|Duraludon}} appear in [[Pokémon UNITE]] as an enemy Trainer to fight during the Legacy Trainer Showdown event between September 9, 2022 and October 6, 2022. It took place on [[Theia Sky Ruins]]. The other members of his team are [[Cynthia]], [[Korrina]], [[Leon]], and {{ga|Green}}. The event later returned between April 21, 2023 and May 21, 2023.

Raihan and his Duraludon also appear as an enemy Trainer in the recurring {{DL|Theia Sky Ruins|Solo Challenge}} event. It also takes place on Theia Sky Ruins. This event has Casual, Intermediate, Expert, and Extreme difficulties. The composition of the opposing team varies depending on the event and the difficulty. The full team consists of himself, Cynthia, Korrina, Leon, and Green. In Cynthia themed events, Raihan and the other non-Cynthia members do not appear in the Casual difficulty, being replaced by {{tc|Ace Trainer}}s. On the Intermediate difficulty, only Leon and Green are replaced by Ace Trainers. In Leon themed events, Raihan and the other non-Leon members do not appear in the Casual difficulty, being replaced by Ace Trainers. On the Intermediate difficulty, only Cynthia and Green are replaced by Ace Trainers. In this mode, Raihan and his Duraludon never use [[Holowear]].

Unlike other Trainers in this game, Raihan and the non-Ace Trainer members of his team are represented with two-dimensional artwork instead of three-dimensional models. In the pre-battle splash screen, Raihan has a custom Unite Snapshot depicting him and his Duraludon with two dimensional artwork. (The normal display of the Unite License/Holowear is not used.)

Raihan was included as part of the {{DL|List of events in Pokémon UNITE|Dragon Carnival}} event, though he did not make an in-person appearance. His art happens to be included in the menus. The event missions menu, normally called Full-Burst Battle! Dragon Dustup Challenge, is identified as the Raihan Dragon Challenge or Raihan's Dragon Challenge in the menus for the event's Dragon Challenge Coins and in certain out of game sources.<ref>Hurry, Hurry! Step Right Up for Pokémon UNITE's Dragon Carnival, Pokémon UNITE News on the Nintendo Switch News app, 5/15/2024</ref><ref>[https://www.pokemon.com/us/pokemon-news/play-a-new-type-of-quick-battle-and-more-during-pokemon-unites-dragon-carnival-event Play a New Type of Quick Battle and More During Pokémon UNITE’s Dragon Carnival Event]</ref> It rewarded a Trainer Outfit that allows players to use Raihan's attire, as well as a Unite Snapshot background featuring Raihan. (Note that this background is not a modified version of the one Raihan himself uses in Legacy Trainer Showdown and Solo Challenge, instead being Raihan on a red background.)
